name: 1'6"x2'6" Welcome Rectangle Outdoor Door Mat White - Threshold™
description:
Add the perfect finishing touch to your outdoor decor with this 'Welcome' Rectangle Outdoor Doormat from Threshold™. The medium-pile doormat is made of coir material that effectively removes dirt and debris from shoes right at your doorstep, while latex backing helps to keep it in place. The rectangular doormat features the text ''Welcome'' in a black hue on a white crisscross backdrop to create a warm and friendly vibe in your space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
